title: koeleria sabuletorum
intro: Koeleria sabuletorum, also known as early hair-grass, is a perennial grass species that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Koeleria sabuletorum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and treat digestive issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
